title: cyclanthera glabra
intro: Cyclanthera glabra, also known as the smooth gourd or white gourd, is a type of vining plant belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclanthera glabra include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine to make capsules or powder for oral consumption.
